info.title: Tripdeck API
info.description: REST API for the Tripdeck travel planning application.

get.summary: Get full trip content (days, attractions, connections)

route.example: JR 稻荷站 → 京都站

post.summary: Add an attraction to a day
Add a connection between two attractions

route.example: JR 稻荷站 → 京都站
JR 稻荷站 → 京都站

get.summary: Get the packing checklist for a trip
get.description: Returns the trip checklist. Automatically initialized from the global template if it does not exist yet.

post.summary: Add a packing occasion to a trip checklist

delete.description: Rejected with 409 if this is the last remaining occasion.

put.summary: Set the checked state of an item within an occasion

get.summary: Get the global packing checklist template

200.description: Full template with all categories and items

post.summary: Add a category to the template

delete.summary: Delete a template category and all its items

post.summary: Add an item to a template category
